items.title: Renew Cambridge Parking Permit
items.description: Resident and visitor parking permits should be renewed online or in person before the city deadline.

items.title: Apply for Cambridge Personal Tax Exemptions
items.description: Eligible residents can apply for Cambridge personal tax exemptions by the annual filing deadline.

items.title: Early Release Wednesday (K-8)
items.description: Upcoming Cambridge Public Schools schedule change.

items.title: Beginner ESOL (Central Square)
items.location: Central Square Branch, 45 Pearl St., Cambridge, MA 02139
items.description: Join us for an English for Speakers of Other Languages (ESOL) class.

items.title: High Beginner ESOL (Central Square)
items.location: Central Square Branch, 45 Pearl St., Cambridge, MA 02139
items.description: Join us for an English for Speakers of Other Languages (ESOL) Class.

items.title: Fiber Crafts Group - Drop-In (O'Connell)
items.location: O'Connell Branch, 48 Sixth St., Cambridge, MA 02141
items.description: Bring your project and enjoy the company of other fiber crafters Drop-in with this informal group to work on your craft, get inspired, pick up skills and socialize.

items.title: Wellness for Older Adults: Low-impact Fitness (Main)
items.location: Main Library, Community Room, 449 Broadway, Cambridge, MA 02138
items.description: This class is designed for people of all levels to strengthen the muscles, the heart and the brain--all while having fun and moving to great music!

items.title: Apply for Cambridge Public Health Mini-Grants
items.description: Community groups, schools, businesses, and other local organizations can apply for Cambridge Public Health mini-grants supporting healthy eating, physical activity, or youth wellness.

items.title: No School & CPS Offices Closed: Good Friday
items.description: Upcoming Cambridge Public Schools schedule change.

items.title: Apply for Cambridge Preschool Program Spring Match
items.description: Cambridge families can apply for the Cambridge Preschool Program spring match for free public preschool and participating community-based providers.

items.title: Apply to Cambridge Homeownership Resale Pool
items.display_date: Applications accepted on a rolling basis
items.description: Cambridge accepts rolling applications for affordable homeownership units offered through the Homeownership Resale Pool.

items.title: Apply to Cambridge Rental Applicant Pool
items.display_date: Applications accepted on a rolling basis
items.description: Cambridge is accepting new preliminary applications for affordable inclusionary rental housing through the Rental Applicant Pool.

items.title: Browse Cambridge Arts Events
items.description: Cambridge Arts publishes a local arts and culture calendar, festival information, and public art resources.

items.title: Check Current and Upcoming Cambridge Public Meetings
items.description: PrimeGov lists current and upcoming Cambridge public meetings, agendas, and documents.

items.title: Join Cambridge Middle-Income Rental Waiting Pool
items.display_date: Applications accepted on a rolling basis
items.description: Cambridge is accepting applications for its Middle-Income Rental Program waiting pool for affordable apartments.

items.title: Return Your Cambridge Annual City Census
items.description: Cambridge residents should return the 2026 annual city census to protect voting rights and support municipal services.
items.source: Cambridge Election Commission (Complete and Return Your 2026 Annual City Census)

items.title: Track Cambridge Affordable Homeownership Lotteries
items.display_date: Sign up for future lottery notices
items.description: New affordable homeownership units are sold through separate application processes and lotteries when they become available.
